name: llmoxie-sandbox-walkthrough
description: Get Started walkthrough for the LLMoxie NAIRR RSE sandbox.

commands.title: LLMoxie Sandbox: Open the seismology research-arc deck

walkthroughs.title: LLMoxie RSE Sandbox
walkthroughs.description: Select a model, verify the gateway, and start the research loop.

steps.title: Acknowledgements
steps.description:
This sandbox is made possible by the UW Scientific Software Engineering Center (SSEC) at the eScience Institute, with support from the NSF NAIRR Pilot (award #240292) and Schmidt Sciences through the VISS program.
Check this step off and move on.

steps.title: Environment ready
steps.description:
The devcontainer already prepared everything: the pixi Python environment, the LLMoxie Model Provider extension, and the Copilot CLI wired to the gateway.
Check this step off and move on.

steps.title: Select a UW SSEC model
steps.description:
Open Copilot Chat and click the model selector (it reads "Auto") on the toolbar right underneath the input box. The UW SSEC models don't appear on their own — click the gear icon to open the Language Models manager (they're hidden at the bottom, under "LLMoxie Gateway"), then close it, reopen the selector, expand "Other Models", and select "GPT 5.5 (UW SSEC)".
[Open Copilot Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Verify the gateway
steps.description:
Run the verification task — it checks the gateway connection and the UW SSEC models, with a clear pass/fail in the terminal.
[Run verification](command:workbench.action.tasks.runTask?%22verify-gateway%22)

steps.title: Try your first prompt
steps.description:
Send one prompt to confirm the whole stack end-to-end.
[Open Copilot Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Start the research loop
steps.description:
Open the guided deck — it opens directly as slides in the Marp preview.
[Open seismic deck](command:llmoxie-sandbox-walkthrough.openSeismicDeck)
